productContext.title: FlexFit Premium Yoga Mat - Extra Thick 6mm Non-Slip Exercise Mat for Pilates & Stretching, with Carrying Strap (68" x 24")
productContext.category: Sports & Outdoors > Exercise & Fitness > Yoga Mats

availableProducts.title: FlexFit Premium Yoga Mat - Extra Thick 6mm Non-Slip Exercise Mat for Pilates & Stretching, with Carrying Strap (68" x 24")

suggestedNegativeKeywords.reasoning: Free-seeking shoppers rarely convert on a $34.99 premium product
Price-sensitive shoppers looking for budget options, not a premium mat
Parents looking for children's play mats, not a yoga mat
Commercial gym flooring shoppers want large floor tiles, not personal yoga mats
Foam roller shoppers want recovery tools, not exercise mats

referenceCampaigns.name: SP - Yoga Mat - Feature Focus
referenceCampaigns.reasoning: Exact match on feature-specific keywords (non-slip, thick, cushioned, with strap) captures shoppers comparing specific attributes. These have lower competition and higher conversion rates than generic 'yoga mat' searches.

referenceCampaigns.name: SP - Yoga Mat - Category Discovery
referenceCampaigns.reasoning: Broad and phrase match discover adjacent fitness categories. Dynamic-up-only bidding prevents over-spending on broad terms. Negatives filter out play mats, gym flooring, and foam rollers — common budget wasters in this category.

evaluationCriteria.name: Campaign Structure
evaluationCriteria.description: Campaign uses an appropriate type, targeting mode, and bid strategy for the product and goals.
checks: Campaign type is 'sponsored-products' (correct for a single ASIN product)
Bid strategy is dynamic (up-only or up-down) rather than legacy

evaluationCriteria.name: Keyword Selection
evaluationCriteria.description: Keywords are relevant, have appropriate match types, and cover both high-intent and discovery terms.
checks: At least 3 exact match keywords for high-intent targeting
At least 2 broad/phrase keywords for discovery
Feature keywords (non-slip, thick, with strap) are included

evaluationCriteria.name: Negative Keywords
evaluationCriteria.description: Negative keywords effectively filter out irrelevant and low-converting search traffic.
checks: Negative keywords include 'kids play mat' or 'gym flooring' (different products)
Fitness accessory terms (foam roller) are negated

evaluationCriteria.name: Bid Configuration
evaluationCriteria.description: Bids are set at appropriate levels relative to product margin, competition, and keyword intent.
checks: Default bid is within reasonable range ($0.50 - $2.00)
Exact match bids are higher than broad match bids
No bids exceed max profitable CPC (AOV x CVR x Target ACoS = ~$0.61)
Feature-specific keywords have competitive bids for their lower competition

evaluationCriteria.name: Budget Allocation
evaluationCriteria.description: Daily budget is set appropriately for the product's sales velocity and goals.
checks: Daily budget is at least $10 (minimum for meaningful data collection)
Daily budget is at most $100 (appropriate for a $34.99 product)
Budget accommodates at least 10 clicks per day at the default bid

missionBrief.title: Premium Yoga Mat Campaign Architecture
missionBrief.scenario: You are launching a new Amazon PPC campaign for the FlexFit Premium Yoga Mat — a $34.99 extra thick 6mm mat with non-slip surface and carrying strap, with a 45% profit margin. Your target ACoS is 25%, meaning your break-even CPC is approximately $0.61 (AOV x CVR x Target ACoS). The yoga/fitness category is crowded with many similar products, but your product has clear differentiators: 6mm thickness, non-slip texture, and included carrying strap. Your challenge is to build a campaign structure that emphasizes these features through keyword selection while avoiding irrelevant fitness equipment searches that can drain your budget.
objectives: Choose the right campaign type and targeting mode for a feature-differentiated fitness product
Select keywords that highlight product differentiators (6mm thickness, non-slip, carrying strap)
Add negative keywords to filter out irrelevant fitness equipment searches
Set a daily budget appropriate for a mid-price fitness product
Choose a bid strategy that balances feature-premium positioning with profitability
tips: Feature-specific keywords like '6mm yoga mat' and 'non-slip yoga mat' have lower competition and higher conversion
Generic 'exercise mat' is broad and includes everything from kids' play mats to gym flooring — negate aggressively
Your carrying strap is a differentiator — include 'yoga mat with strap' keywords
45% margin gives you decent room, but don't overbid on high-competition generic terms
Fitness accessories (foam rollers, resistance bands) are NOT your product — keep them out with negatives
